summary: Interactive Maps and RookGuide Testing - All tests PASSED. Frontend: 28 tests (14 RookGuide + 14 Interactive Maps). Backend: 12 tests (World Maps CRUD, Pins, Paths, Travel Calculator, Local Maps).

breakdown.rook-guide.spec.ts: 14/14 passed - Dashboard guides, Campaign tab guides, dismiss functionality, localStorage persistence
breakdown.interactive-maps.spec.ts: 14/14 passed (3 skipped when no pins exist) - World Map toolbar, modes, pins, paths, travel calculator, Local Map sidebar, pins
breakdown.test_interactive_maps.py: 12/12 passed - World Maps CRUD, pins CRUD, paths, travel calculation, Local Maps CRUD

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup test maps/pins/paths automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features tested: 1) RookGuide - First-time user tips component that shows on dashboard (Player/GM sections) and all Campaign Dashboard tabs. Guide dismissal persists in localStorage under 'rook_guides_dismissed' key. Uses data-testid='rook-guide-{guideId}' pattern. 2) Interactive Maps - World Map has View/Add Location/Add Path/Travel Calculator modes. Pins have data-testid='map-pin-{id}'. Local Maps have POI pins with data-testid='local-pin-{id}'. Travel Calculator shows formatted travel time based on distance, terrain, and travel mode.

features: Player section guide visible on dashboard
GM section guide visible on dashboard
Setting tab guide shows on navigate
World Map tab guide with map tips
Toolbar with mode buttons (View, Add Location, Add Path, Travel Calculator)
Upload Map modal with name, scale, unit, image fields
Mode switching between View/Add Location/Add Path/Travel
Pin info panel on click with Edit and Travel From buttons
Travel mode panel appears on entering travel mode
Travel modes: walking, horseback, cart, ship, flying
Location sidebar with All Maps option
Upload Local Map modal with location selector
Pin type display (Shop, Tavern, Temple, etc)
